meta.name: PRSM EMERGENCY: Pause FTNSBridge
meta.description: Pauses bridge operations between Ethereum L1 and Base L2. Stops bridge-out (locking) and bridge-in (minting) calls; in-flight messages remain pending until unpause. USE FOR: bridge exploit, double-spend across chains, signature-verification failure, BridgeSecurity contract anomaly. Bridge-only pause does NOT affect normal Base-side FTNS transfers — that requires FTNSTokenSimple pause separately. See EXPLOIT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK.md §6 + Risk Register A5.
